'''"Blue" Imcrix''' was an infamous [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Taloron]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who was involved in [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] around the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Imcrix discovered a valuable source of the rare, potent narcotic known as [[Rokna Blue|Rokna blue]] in an abandoned [[Rokna Station|space station]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], and lured a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents to the [[Space station/Legends|station]], hijacked their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and attempted to use them as shields in his efforts to retrieve the drugs first. Imcrix's plot wound up unsuccessful, and he was arrested and returned to the New Republic for trial.

==Biography==
A member of the [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="domain">{{WEGCite|story=Domain of Evil|book=Classic Adventures: Volume Two}}</ref> known as the [[Taloron]], "Blue" Imcrix was a notorious [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who was active in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] during the era of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Imcrix was involved in [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] activities, and towards the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] he discovered a potentially lucrative source of [[Rokna Blue|Rokna blue]], a once-popular narcotic extracted from a [[Rokna tree fungus|fungus]] found on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. Imcrix learned that a potent strain of Rokna blue had grown in an abandoned drug lab in [[Rokna Station]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].<ref name="wired" /> However, the New Republic also learned of the existence of the Rokna, and sent a demolition team to destroy the [[Space station/Legends|station]] and destroy Imcrix's source. Needing a diversion to help him retrieve the drugs before the station was destroyed, Imcrix reactivated Rokna Station's defense systems, which began firing at random passersby. This attracted a separate group of New Republic agents—Imcrix and his crew then hijacked their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and tried to use them as shields as he tried to extract the drugs. However, Imcrix's plot was unsuccessful, and the agents captured the crime lord and turned him over to the New Republic for trial.<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|II|85|Imcrix, "Blue"}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
An infamous crime lord by the time of the New Republic, "Blue" Imcrix was an active participant in spice smuggling and other illegal activities, and was willing to go to lengths such as hijacking and kidnapping in order to protect his profits.<ref name="wired" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Blue" Imcrix first appeared in "[[Wired to Kill]]," a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure scenario that was published in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] in [[2002]].<ref name="wired" /> Imcrix later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]].<ref name="cswe" /> Those two sources differ on Imcrix's role in the action on Rokna Station: while the ''Encyclopedia'' states that Imcrix reactivates the station's weapons systems in an attempt to lure New Republic agents, "Wired to Kill" suggests that the station reactivates on its own in an effort to protect the stash of Rokna blue, and Imcrix arrives afterward. For the purposes of this article, the newer source is treated as being correct.
